challenges.chief_complaint: Sharp, shooting pain radiating down the posterior thigh to the lateral foot.
challenges.case: Sagittal T2-weighted lumbar spine MRI showing disc protrusion compressing the nerve root.

challenges.chief_complaint: Sudden sharp pop in the heel during sprint, inability to plantarflex.
challenges.case: Sagittal ankle MRI displaying high signal intensity and discontinuity in tendon fibers.

challenges.chief_complaint: Severe locking and catching sensation when flexing the knee.
challenges.case: Coronal knee MRI displaying double-posterior cruciate ligament (double PCL) sign.
